  "actions": [
    "Verify the conductor size, insulation type, and termination temperature ratings (60C/75C/90C)",
    "Select and install a correctly sized overcurrent protective device (OCPD) matching the conductor's allowable ampacity per NEC 240.4",
    "Ensure compliance with NEC 110.14(C) temperature limits"
  ],
  "rationale": "The current installation has a mismatch between the overcurrent protective device (breaker) and the conductor ampacity, which is a severe fire and safety hazard. The breaker must be resized down or the conductor upsized to ensure the conductor is properly protected under NEC 240 and 110.14(C) guidelines before the system is energized or returned to service.",
